title: monitoring — settings
description: Tenant-facing monitoring configuration + per-user preferences for alert notifications + weekly digest subscription. The monitoring_provider_configs table is NOT settings — those are per-provider credentials owned by the monitoring module itself. This file declares tenant-level defaults (default alert routing, escalation contacts, suppression windows) + per-user preferences (which severities to page).

groups.label: System monitoring
groups.description: Tenant-wide defaults for monitoring capture + notification routing.

sections.label: Alert defaults
sections.description: Tenant-wide defaults applied to newly-configured alert policies.

fields.name: default_consecutive_breaches_required
fields.label: Default consecutive breaches required
fields.helpText: How many consecutive threshold breaches before an alert fires. 2 filters transient spikes; 1 fires on every single breach.

fields.name: default_window_seconds
fields.label: Default threshold window (seconds)
fields.helpText: How much history the evaluator considers when computing the threshold value. 300s = 5min.

sections.label: Suppression windows
sections.description: When to silence non-P1 alerts automatically.

fields.name: suppress_p1_after_hours
fields.label: Also suppress P1 alerts after hours
fields.helpText: WARNING. Default off — P1 alerts are pageable regardless of hours. Only enable when your on-call rotation is truly 09:00-18:00.

sections.label: Notification routing
sections.description: Where alert + incident notifications are delivered.

fields.name: primary_oncall_users
fields.label: Primary on-call users
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives P1 + P2 MonitoringAlertFiredNotification. Tenant owners are always notified regardless.

fields.name: escalation_oncall_users
fields.label: Escalation on-call users
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives MonitoringIncidentEscalatedNotification when the primary on-call misses the SLA.

fields.name: postmortem_reviewer_users
fields.label: Postmortem reviewers
fields.helpText: Every user listed receives MonitoringPostmortemRequiredNotification when a P1 incident resolves.

groups.label: My monitoring preferences
groups.description: Per-user preferences for monitoring alerts + digest.

fields.name: receive_p1_alerts
fields.label: Notify me on P1 alerts
fields.helpText: P1 alerts are cannot-opt-out for the primary on-call user; this preference only applies when you are NOT the primary on-call.

fields.name: receive_weekly_digest
fields.label: Send me the weekly SLO digest
fields.helpText: Every Monday 09:00 tenant-local: alert counts by severity, MTTR, top 5 firing policies, top 5 unhealthy checks.
